body.head: Customer feedback needed
body.name: Dear %%name%%,
body.text-one: Yesterday we asked you to answer a few questions about the quality of our trading platform. It pains us to admit it, but due to a technical malfunction, all of the survey data was lost.
body.text-two: Your feedback is absolutely instrumental in helping us create the best trading platform possible. That is why we kindly ask you to take a moment to fill out the survey once again.
